TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_U_lisin_nu_Pangcah_tu_cacayay_a_mihca, title = U_lisin_nu_Pangcah_tu_cacayay_a_mihca, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/U_lisin_nu_Pangcah_tu_cacayay_a_mihca} }

S.FORM: == U lisin nu Pangcah tu cacayay a mihca == Silisin 'amin ku kalu niyaru nu Pangcah i cacayay a mihca, nu i amisay a Pangcah ku suwalen anini. U saka cacay a bulad, u ''pisaumahan '' a bulad. Mibulsak ku maumahay tu panay. U saka tusa a bulad '' piteluban '' han, marimurak malipahak aca ku niyaru' a malalebulebu ku babainay. U saka sepat a bulad ''pibahbahan ", mapuyapuy ku tipus imatia, uruma ku sida'it nu maumahay a kaenen a buruburen nu takenawan ku mipalumaan. Tangasa hakia i nipitipus ku kapah nu tipus sa a lihalaw. Manay, mitakus ku binawlan tu sikawasay a papibahbay tu matilaay parawacuay misara'cusay tu nipalumaan a takenawan. Urasisa, u inian u nipatatudung a demak, pacucu tu tipus han ku ruma a suwal. Saka lima a bulad, ''mibalidas'' han, mababiyanga ku kapah i kakabekacan nu niyaru. Saka enem atu pituay a bulad, u "pila'disan " tu a bulad, uruma ku lipahak nu babainay a tara i tarawadaw i liyal i ciris a mibuting, salipahak sa ku salumalumaan a malahuk i umah tu nibutingan. Saka walu a bulad, u "pilisinan ", u kalalikidan a bulad, tatalaan u salipahak nu binawlan tu cacay a mihcaan. U babainay a selal, nanu dabak tangasa i katu'eman, caay pasatuku a misakeru i lalikidan. U kapah nu masaselalay, imatia i katuasan a mihca, a ca'ay kitini nu babahi i pilalikidan, paysin saan sa ku suwal nu matuasay. Saka muktepay a bulad "mirecuk " – u lisin nuhni u sikawasay kina bulad, macacuruk kuhni a tayra i ruma' a mapapuhpuh , miasik tu luma' , padaesu tu tireng nuhni. A pacakat aca tu taneng nu tireng tu sakay kawas. Saka sabaw cacay a bulad "talatuas " – misalisin ku binawlan tu tuas nu mita u Pangcah, ira aca a patudung tuini u mapatayay a tamdaw nu luma'.. Saka sabaw tusa a bulad, u "kaliliwan" sa ku suwal nu matuasay. Caay kanca ku babainay pitiker tu ayam i umaumahan, u ruma sa iri, cacay a lalipayan a taira i lutuk, sakasaan, ira haw ku tatangican nu kapahay tarayaay a banuh nu ayam, tu sasangaan tu tinpi' i sakalalikidan nu babainay. Sisa, caay kanca katara i maraayay a lutuk a miteker ku babainay. Anu malemed ira ku nitekeran, tanu ulah sa ku babainay a pataluma' tu ni'alaan, salipahak satu ku lalabu nu luma' a malabi. Ina kakawau, "malahuk tu liliw" han ku suwal.
S.PHON: == o~u~u ɾisin no~u~u paŋʦaħ to~u~u ʦaʦajaj a miħʦa == siɾisin ʡamin ko~u~u kaɾo~u~u nijaro~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ i ʦaʦajaj a miħʦa, no~u~u i amisaj a paŋʦaħ ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾən anini. o~u~u saka ʦaʦaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u ʡʡpisao~u~umaħan ʡʡ a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ. mib~b~vo~u~uɾsak ko~u~u mao~u~umaħaj to~u~u panaj. o~u~u saka to~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʡʡ pitəɾo~u~ub~b~van ʡʡ ħan, marimo~u~urak maɾipaħak aʦa ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ a maɾaɾəb~b~vo~u~uɾəb~b~vo~u~u ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj. o~u~u saka səpat a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʡʡpib~b~vaħb~b~vaħan ", mapo~u~ujapo~u~uj ko~u~u tipo~u~us imatia, o~u~uro~u~uma ko~u~u siɬ~ɮaʡit no~u~u mao~u~umaħaj a kaənən a b~b~vo~u~uro~u~ub~b~vo~u~urən no~u~u takənawan ko~u~u mipaɾo~u~umaan. taŋasa ħakia i nipitipo~u~us ko~u~u kapaħ no~u~u tipo~u~us sa a ɾiħaɾaw. manaj, mitako~u~us ko~u~u b~b~vinawɾan to~u~u sikawasaj a papib~b~vaħb~b~vaj to~u~u matiɾaaj parawaʦo~u~uaj misaraʡʦo~u~usaj to~u~u nipaɾo~u~umaan a takənawan. o~u~urasisa, o~u~u inian o~u~u nipatato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, paʦo~u~uʦo~u~u to~u~u tipo~u~us ħan ko~u~u ro~u~uma a so~u~uwaɾ. saka ɾima a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʡʡmib~b~vaɾiɬ~ɮasʡʡ ħan, mab~b~vab~b~vijaŋa ko~u~u kapaħ i kakab~b~vəkaʦan no~u~u nijaro~u~u. saka ənəm ato~u~u pito~u~uaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u "piɾaʡɬ~ɮisan " to~u~u a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~uro~u~uma ko~u~u ɾipaħak no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a tara i tarawaɬ~ɮaw i ɾijaɾ i ʦiris a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ, saɾipaħak sa ko~u~u saɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaan a maɾaħo~u~uk i o~u~umaħ to~u~u nib~b~vo~u~utiŋan. saka waɾo~u~u a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u "piɾisinan ", o~u~u kaɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, tataɾaan o~u~u saɾipaħak no~u~u b~b~vinawɾan to~u~u ʦaʦaj a miħʦaan. o~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a səɾaɾ, nano~u~u ɬ~ɮab~b~vak taŋasa i kato~u~uʡəman, ʦaaj pasato~u~uko~u~u a misakəro~u~u i ɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan. o~u~u kapaħ no~u~u masasəɾaɾaj, imatia i kato~u~uasan a miħʦa, a ʦaʡaj kitini no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi i piɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan, pajsin saan sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj. saka mo~u~uktəpaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ "mirəʦo~u~uk " * o~u~u ɾisin no~u~uħni o~u~u sikawasaj kina b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maʦaʦo~u~uro~u~uk ko~u~uħni a tajra i ro~u~umaʡ a mapapo~u~uħpo~u~uħ , miasik to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ , paɬ~ɮaəso~u~u to~u~u tirəŋ no~u~uħni. a paʦakat aʦa to~u~u tanəŋ no~u~u tirəŋ to~u~u sakaj kawas. saka sab~b~vaw ʦaʦaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ "taɾato~u~uas " * misaɾisin ko~u~u b~b~vinawɾan to~u~u to~u~uas no~u~u mita o~u~u paŋʦaħ, ira aʦa a pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~uini o~u~u mapatajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ.. saka sab~b~vaw to~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u "kaɾiɾiwan" sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj. ʦaaj kanʦa ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj pitikər to~u~u ajam i o~u~umao~u~umaħan, o~u~u ro~u~uma sa iri, ʦaʦaj a ɾaɾipajan a taira i ɾo~u~uto~u~uk, sakasaan, ira ħaw ko~u~u tataŋiʦan no~u~u kapaħaj tarajaaj a b~b~vano~u~uħ no~u~u ajam, to~u~u sasaŋaan to~u~u tinpiʡ i sakaɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj. sisa, ʦaaj kanʦa katara i maraajaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk a mitəkər ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj. ano~u~u maɾəməɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u nitəkəran, tano~u~u o~u~uɾaħ sa ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a pataɾo~u~umaʡ to~u~u niʡaɾaan, saɾipaħak sato~u~u ko~u~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a maɾab~b~vi. ina kakawao~u~u, "maɾaħo~u~uk to~u~u ɾiɾiw" ħan ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ.
S.FORM: == U lisin nu Pangcah tu cacayay a mihca == Silisin 'amin ku kalu niyaru nu Pangcah i cacayay a mihca, nu i amisay a Pangcah ku suwalen anini. U saka cacay a bulad, u ''pisaumahan '' a bulad. Mibulsak ku maumahay tu panay. U saka tusa a bulad '' piteluban '' han, marimurak malipahak aca ku niyaru' a malalebulebu ku babainay. U saka sepat a bulad ''pibahbahan ", mapuyapuy ku tipus imatia, uruma ku sida'it nu maumahay a kaenen a buruburen nu takenawan ku mipalumaan. Tangasa hakia i nipitipus ku kapah nu tipus sa a lihalaw. Manay, mitakus ku binawlan tu sikawasay a papibahbay tu matilaay parawacuay misara'cusay tu nipalumaan a takenawan. Urasisa, u inian u nipatatudung a demak, pacucu tu tipus han ku ruma a suwal. Saka lima a bulad, ''mibalidas'' han, mababiyanga ku kapah i kakabekacan nu niyaru. Saka enem atu pituay a bulad, u "pila'disan " tu a bulad, uruma ku lipahak nu babainay a tara i tarawadaw i liyal i ciris a mibuting, salipahak sa ku salumalumaan a malahuk i umah tu nibutingan. Saka walu a bulad, u "pilisinan ", u kalalikidan a bulad, tatalaan u salipahak nu binawlan tu cacay a mihcaan. U babainay a selal, nanu dabak tangasa i katu'eman, caay pasatuku a misakeru i lalikidan. U kapah nu masaselalay, imatia i katuasan a mihca, a ca'ay kitini nu babahi i pilalikidan, paysin saan sa ku suwal nu matuasay. Saka muktepay a bulad "mirecuk " – u lisin nuhni u sikawasay kina bulad, macacuruk kuhni a tayra i ruma' a mapapuhpuh , miasik tu luma' , padaesu tu tireng nuhni. A pacakat aca tu taneng nu tireng tu sakay kawas. Saka sabaw cacay a bulad "talatuas " – misalisin ku binawlan tu tuas nu mita u Pangcah, ira aca a patudung tuini u mapatayay a tamdaw nu luma'.. Saka sabaw tusa a bulad, u "kaliliwan" sa ku suwal nu matuasay. Caay kanca ku babainay pitiker tu ayam i umaumahan, u ruma sa iri, cacay a lalipayan a taira i lutuk, sakasaan, ira haw ku tatangican nu kapahay tarayaay a banuh nu ayam, tu sasangaan tu tinpi' i sakalalikidan nu babainay. Sisa, caay kanca katara i maraayay a lutuk a miteker ku babainay. Anu malemed ira ku nitekeran, tanu ulah sa ku babainay a pataluma' tu ni'alaan, salipahak satu ku lalabu nu luma' a malabi. Ina kakawau, "malahuk tu liliw" han ku suwal.
S.PHON: == o~u~u ɾisin no~u~u paŋʦaħ to~u~u ʦaʦajaj a miħʦa == siɾisin ʡamin ko~u~u kaɾo~u~u nijaro~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ i ʦaʦajaj a miħʦa, no~u~u i amisaj a paŋʦaħ ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾən anini. o~u~u saka ʦaʦaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u ʡʡpisao~u~umaħan ʡʡ a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ. mib~b~vo~u~uɾsak ko~u~u mao~u~umaħaj to~u~u panaj. o~u~u saka to~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʡʡ pitəɾo~u~ub~b~van ʡʡ ħan, marimo~u~urak maɾipaħak aʦa ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ a maɾaɾəb~b~vo~u~uɾəb~b~vo~u~u ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj. o~u~u saka səpat a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʡʡpib~b~vaħb~b~vaħan ", mapo~u~ujapo~u~uj ko~u~u tipo~u~us imatia, o~u~uro~u~uma ko~u~u siɬ~ɮaʡit no~u~u mao~u~umaħaj a kaənən a b~b~vo~u~uro~u~ub~b~vo~u~urən no~u~u takənawan ko~u~u mipaɾo~u~umaan. taŋasa ħakia i nipitipo~u~us ko~u~u kapaħ no~u~u tipo~u~us sa a ɾiħaɾaw. manaj, mitako~u~us ko~u~u b~b~vinawɾan to~u~u sikawasaj a papib~b~vaħb~b~vaj to~u~u matiɾaaj parawaʦo~u~uaj misaraʡʦo~u~usaj to~u~u nipaɾo~u~umaan a takənawan. o~u~urasisa, o~u~u inian o~u~u nipatato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, paʦo~u~uʦo~u~u to~u~u tipo~u~us ħan ko~u~u ro~u~uma a so~u~uwaɾ. saka ɾima a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʡʡmib~b~vaɾiɬ~ɮasʡʡ ħan, mab~b~vab~b~vijaŋa ko~u~u kapaħ i kakab~b~vəkaʦan no~u~u nijaro~u~u. saka ənəm ato~u~u pito~u~uaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u "piɾaʡɬ~ɮisan " to~u~u a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~uro~u~uma ko~u~u ɾipaħak no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a tara i tarawaɬ~ɮaw i ɾijaɾ i ʦiris a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ, saɾipaħak sa ko~u~u saɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaan a maɾaħo~u~uk i o~u~umaħ to~u~u nib~b~vo~u~utiŋan. saka waɾo~u~u a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u "piɾisinan ", o~u~u kaɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, tataɾaan o~u~u saɾipaħak no~u~u b~b~vinawɾan to~u~u ʦaʦaj a miħʦaan. o~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a səɾaɾ, nano~u~u ɬ~ɮab~b~vak taŋasa i kato~u~uʡəman, ʦaaj pasato~u~uko~u~u a misakəro~u~u i ɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan. o~u~u kapaħ no~u~u masasəɾaɾaj, imatia i kato~u~uasan a miħʦa, a ʦaʡaj kitini no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi i piɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan, pajsin saan sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj. saka mo~u~uktəpaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ "mirəʦo~u~uk " * o~u~u ɾisin no~u~uħni o~u~u sikawasaj kina b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maʦaʦo~u~uro~u~uk ko~u~uħni a tajra i ro~u~umaʡ a mapapo~u~uħpo~u~uħ , miasik to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ , paɬ~ɮaəso~u~u to~u~u tirəŋ no~u~uħni. a paʦakat aʦa to~u~u tanəŋ no~u~u tirəŋ to~u~u sakaj kawas. saka sab~b~vaw ʦaʦaj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ "taɾato~u~uas " * misaɾisin ko~u~u b~b~vinawɾan to~u~u to~u~uas no~u~u mita o~u~u paŋʦaħ, ira aʦa a pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~uini o~u~u mapatajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ.. saka sab~b~vaw to~u~usa a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u "kaɾiɾiwan" sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj. ʦaaj kanʦa ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj pitikər to~u~u ajam i o~u~umao~u~umaħan, o~u~u ro~u~uma sa iri, ʦaʦaj a ɾaɾipajan a taira i ɾo~u~uto~u~uk, sakasaan, ira ħaw ko~u~u tataŋiʦan no~u~u kapaħaj tarajaaj a b~b~vano~u~uħ no~u~u ajam, to~u~u sasaŋaan to~u~u tinpiʡ i sakaɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan no~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj. sisa, ʦaaj kanʦa katara i maraajaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk a mitəkər ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj. ano~u~u maɾəməɬ~ɮ ira ko~u~u nitəkəran, tano~u~u o~u~uɾaħ sa ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj a pataɾo~u~umaʡ to~u~u niʡaɾaan, saɾipaħak sato~u~u ko~u~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a maɾab~b~vi. ina kakawao~u~u, "maɾaħo~u~uk to~u~u ɾiɾiw" ħan ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ.
